projects.name: WeaveStudio
projects.purpose: Turn messy inputs into structured, exportable deliverables with a local-first visual workflow canvas.
implemented_features: Typed nodes (Input, Transform, Decision, Review, Output)
demo_or_mock_features: AI Assist Blueprint (Simulated mock generation, BYOK-ready for future adapters)
projects.commercial_positioning: Local-first visual workflow canvas IP, positioned for acquisition ($3k-$5k) by builders needing a workflow foundation.
constraints: No backend, auth, or cloud sync
avoid_claims: Fact verification or automated truth extraction
known_issues: Data loss risk due to localStorage volatility
PDF export fidelity is limited (text mapping only)
next_steps: Send outreach messages to indie builders and consultants
memory_facts: WeaveStudio is my primary local-first visual workflow builder.
It was successfully completed and is currently packaged for IP acquisition.
It demonstrates high-level React flow state management without needing a backend.

user_goals: Sell WeaveStudio as a source code/IP asset
Build a strong portfolio demonstrating complex frontend architecture
employment_relevance: Strong signal for frontend roles requiring state machine, DAG, or canvas manipulation skills
known_constraints: Focus is on local-first, meaning cloud integration is actively avoided in this release
recommended_priorities: Demo the mock AI feature as a clean UX pattern for BYOK architectures
